text:
is a song composed by Shouichi Kaneko for singer Ryōko Moriyama in 1967. It was featured in the soundtrack of the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance released in 2009, where it is performed by Megumi Hayashibara .

It was published on the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack under the title "Kyou no Hi wa Sayounara". In the second disc of the special edition of this album, an extended version of this song is available under the title "Kyou no Hi wa Sayounara - Tribute to "Sound of Music"".

In the film, it plays when the dummy system takes over Evangelion Unit-01 during the battle against the Ninth Angel.

Staff

Composition: Shouichi Kaneko
Lyrics: Shouichi Kaneko
Arrangements: Motoki Funayama, Shirō Sagisu
Vocals: Megumi Hayashibara
Choir: Oyobi Special Kids, Suginami Shounen Shoujo Gasshoudan (Tribute to "Sound of Music")
